name: Frangelico Chocolate Cake with Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour two 9-inch cake pans.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Separate the eggs.
4. Beat egg whites until frothy; then beat in sugar until stiff peaks form. Set aside.
5. Cream butter and brown sugar until fluffy. Add yolks one at a time.
6. Sift flour, cocoa, baking soda together. Add to creamed mixture alternately with coffee and Frangelico; blend well.
7. Fold egg whites into the batter. Pour into prepared pans.
8. Bake 30-35 minutes or until done. Cool for 10 minutes.
9. Invert cakes on wire racks and remove pans. Cool before frosting.
----------------------------------FROSTING----------------------------------
6 tablespoons Butter
1 pound Sifted powdered sugar
3 tablespoons Unsweetened cocoa powder
3 tablespoons Frangelico
2 tablespoons Up to 3 teaspoons hot coffee
1. Cream butter with sugar.
2. Add everything else and beat until smooth.
